task_completion.description: Verify that the agent has accessed the Vicidial admin interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing the Vicidial administration web interface (usually at http://localhost/vicidial/admin.php).

task_completion.description: Verify the basic settings for Phone Extension 1 are entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot of the Add/Edit Phone form showing Extension '8501', Dialplan Number '8501', Voicemail ID '8501', Full Name 'Remote Agent East', and a valid Server IP selected.

task_completion.description: Verify the authentication and protocol settings for Phone Extension 1 are entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot of the Add/Edit Phone form showing Phone Login 'cc_remote_8501', Phone Password 'Xk9mPw2nQ', Registration Password 'Xk9mPw2nQ', Protocol 'SIP', and Local GMT '-5.00'.

task_completion.description: Verify the basic settings for Phone Extension 2 are entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot of the Add/Edit Phone form showing Extension '8502', Dialplan Number '8502', Voicemail ID '8502', Full Name 'Remote Agent Central', and a valid Server IP selected.

task_completion.description: Verify the authentication and protocol settings for Phone Extension 2 are entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot of the Add/Edit Phone form showing Phone Login 'cc_remote_8502', Phone Password 'Qr7nLv4bZ', Registration Password 'Qr7nLv4bZ', Protocol 'SIP', and Local GMT '-6.00'.

task_completion.description: Verify that both phone extensions have been successfully created and are listed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot of the Vicidial 'Phones' listing page showing both extensions '8501' and '8502' as active entries.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web GUI to configure the phones.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser interacting with the Vicidial admin interface, utilizing the provided Admin URL.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually filled out and submitted the forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the forms being filled out or the success confirmation pages, rather than just a text file with the required values.

integrity.description: Verify the results are from actual application state and not HTML manipulation.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should look consistent with standard Vicidial styling without signs of manipulated DOM elements or developer tools open to alter text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Phone 1 requires Extension: 8501, Login: cc_remote_8501, Password: Xk9mPw2nQ, GMT: -5.00. Phone 2 requires Extension: 8502, Login: cc_remote_8502, Password: Qr7nLv4bZ, GMT: -6.00.
